reviews.comment:
Es un estación de servicio pequeña pero con una atención muy amable y eficiente. Los baños súper limpios y con todo lo necesario.

(Translated by Google)
It's a small gas station, but the service is very friendly and efficient. The restrooms are spotless and have everything you need.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbWV5c3ZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bueno para salir del apuro si tenes que cargar.  Todo ok tema combustible. Pagué con la aplicación y todo. Lo que si en la parte de ypf full solo aceptan efectivo.

(Translated by Google)
Good for getting out of a tight spot if you need to fill up. Everything was fine regarding fuel. I paid with the app and everything. The only thing is, at YPF Full, they only accept cash.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMV9tdjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta muy lindo parador, además de cargar nafta, también hay drugstore, cafetería y también un área entre árboles para comer o tomar unos mates. La atención es buena y los precios acordes. Lo único que necesita un poco de atención son los baños que están bastante feos.

(Translated by Google)
This is a very nice rest stop; besides filling up with gas, there's also a drugstore, a café, and a shaded area among the trees for eating or enjoying some mate. The service is good and the prices are reasonable. The only thing that needs a little attention is the restrooms, which are quite run-down.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCMXZTdFZ3EAE
